title: Lectures On Quantitative Islamic Finance
author: Syahril, Effendi

description:
This work consists of four parts: 
- Part I: Kuhn-Tucker and Duality 
- Part II: Growth Optimal Portfolio 
- Part III: Growth Optimal Portfolio Under Shariah Restrictions 
- Part IV: Future Directions 
 
Comments and input of this notes directed to fendisyahril@gmail.com.
